description: We are seeking a FULLY REMOTE skilled Python Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable applications, ensuring clean, efficient code and seamless system integration. Job Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain backend systems using Python. Participate in requirement analysis, system design, and database architecture planning. Develop and maintain RESTful APIs to ensure system stability and performance. Optimize application performance and improve code quality and maintainability. Collaborate closely with frontend developers, product managers, and QA teams to deliver projects on time. Prepare technical documentation and participate in code reviews and technical discussions. Job Requirements Diploma or Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field. Minimum 3 years of experience in Python development Familiar with frameworks such as Django, Flask, or FastAPI. Strong understanding of databases such as MySQL or PostgreSQL, with good SQL optimization skills. Familiar with Git version control and basic Linux operations. Good analytical skills, problem-solving ability, and team spirit. Proﬁcient in reading and writing Chinese (Mandarin)
